creator: justins@justnosweat.net
text:
I want to send a mail to freebsd-questions@freebsd.org.
I get a messages from mx1.freebsd.org:
450 4.7.1 Client host rejected: cannot find your hostname, [80.126.252.247]
Seems that the soa file of justnosweat.net is not on the dns server, what`s up????


Thanks,
Justin Schlingmann.
